1.description: Read-only similarity search for peer tickets. Cosine over ai.embeddings_<service>.embedding (chunk_type='symptom_anchor') with HNSW index, tenant pre-filter, optional scope filters (time_filter,same_category_only, same_service_only, prefer_status, min_similarity_score), then composite re-rank using semantic 0.60 + metadata 0.25 + recency 0.15 (spec UC-2 weights). Optional Stage-5 confirmation against chunk_type='diagnosis_trail' nudges true twins. Flags 'likely_duplicate' (sim>0.90 AND same CI AND status=open) or 'resolution_available' (sim>0.85 AND resolved) per spec. Returns at most max_results entries, descending by similarity. Never crosses tenant boundaries (UC-2.4) and silently omits candidates the caller cannot view (UC-2.7).

parameters.description: Source ticket id (e.g. INC0001234 or REQ0001234). Provide this OR query_text; when present the search anchors on the named record.
parameters.name: ticket_id

parameters.description: Free-text problem/symptom description that anchors the search when no ticket id is given (provide this OR ticket_id). The chat router supplies the user's text. With no service_id, both incident and request are searched.
parameters.name: query_text

parameters.description: Service module: 'incident' or 'request'. On the id path it is auto-derived from the ticket_id prefix; on the text path, omit to search both services or set to scope to one.
parameters.name: service_id

parameters.description: Max similar records to return (default 5, cap 20).
parameters.name: max_results

parameters.description: Structured time scope. Built by TimeFilterExtractor on the chat path; button callers may pass it directly. Shape: {relative_days: int, label: str} OR {start_date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', end_date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', label: str}. None ⇒ unbounded.
parameters.name: time_filter

parameters.description: If true, restrict candidates to the same category as source.
parameters.name: same_category_only

parameters.description: If true, restrict to same affected service line.
parameters.name: same_service_only

parameters.description: Stage 5 diagnosis confirm on top-K (default true).
parameters.name: diagnosis_confirm
